name: Sartor Administradora General de Fondos S.A. - Fondo De Inversion Sartor Tactico Fund
summary: Sartor Administradora General de Fondos S.A. - Fondo De Inversion Sartor Tactico Fund is a tactical investment fund. It is managed by Sartor Administradora General de Fondos S.A. and employs a tactical investment strategy.
